coin_profile.name: Hyperliquid
coin_profile.bucket_explanation: A Cash-Flow Protocol is a blockchain or app that earns real money from its users — just like a business. Every time someone makes a trade, borrows money, or uses the network, it collects a small fee. The more people use it, the more fees it earns. We value these tokens similarly to how you would value a business — by looking at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it.
coin_profile.description: Hyperliquid (HYPE) — a Cash-Flow Protocol ranked #11 by market cap.

HYPE.name: Hyperliquid

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Cycle phase (Distribution (near ATH)) not favourable for entry — wait for accumulation or early uptrend.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

meta.data_note: No protocol fee or TVL data found for this token on DeFiLlama. Charts 1 and 2 are unavailable. Charts 3 and 4 show current-year supply and dilution data from CoinGecko.

network_economics.network_synthesis: Hyperliquid (HYPE) is a Cash-Flow Protocol classified as Speculative. Network economics data is available for further analysis.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 5.2/10 and survivability 46.7%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -26.9% p.a.
forecast_meta.method_explanation: How we valued this token: We treat this like a small business. It earns fees every time someone uses it, so we look at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it. We combine up to three simple checks: (1) How busy is the network? More activity usually means more value. (2) Is the market cap cheap or expensive compared to the fees it earns? (3) What price would make sense given its size rank? The Speculative Fair Value is the average of whichever checks produced a sensible result.
forecast_meta.growth_explanation: Base (7.0%/yr): projected growth based on this token's quality score (5.2/10). Bull (13.0%/yr): adoption accelerates and network usage grows strongly. Bear (-26.9%/yr): adoption slows or competition erodes the token's position. The bear scenario is steeper than usual because survivability is only 46.7% — this token has weaker dilution control or holder value accrual, making it more vulnerable in a downturn.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: this token has no DeFiLlama fee tracking. Valuation relies entirely on network activity and market positioning signals. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Metcalfe Network Value is shown in the breakdown chart without contributing to the median: the implied IV is below 10% of current price, indicating the token is trading at a significant premium to its network activity level. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment penalises the large gap between circulating and fully-diluted supply — future token unlocks are expected to create selling pressure. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

HYPE.iv_method: Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, Dilution Adjustment

watchlist_signal.reason: Decent quality but significant token dilution ahead (FDV/MC: 4.2x) — monitor before committing.

bull_points: Current market fear environment may create a near-term mean reversion opportunity in Hyperliquid
Any positive news catalyst — exchange listing, partnership, or protocol upgrade — could trigger a sharp near-term rally from current levels
Crypto market sentiment is cyclical — Hyperliquid's short-term setup may improve as macro uncertainty fades
bear_points: Up 35% in the past week — rapid short-term move increases likelihood of a pullback before the next leg higher
Regulatory developments in major markets could create short-term selling pressure
Without a near-term catalyst, Hyperliquid may continue to consolidate or drift lower

bull_points: Long-term adoption thesis for Cash-Flow Protocol assets remains structurally intact
As the crypto ecosystem matures, Hyperliquid's established position should compound in value
Continued development activity and ecosystem growth support a constructive long-term view
bear_points: No multi-year fee data exists for Hyperliquid — the protocol's long-term economic durability remains unproven

Long-term execution risk remains a key variable for any crypto investment

metric_assessments.fee_growth: Fee Growth is middling. The numbers are acceptable but leave room for improvement.
metric_assessments.capital_efficiency: Capital Efficiency is solid, meeting the expectations you would expect for a protocol at this stage.
metric_assessments.holder_value_accrual: Holder Value Accrual is middling. The numbers are acceptable but leave room for improvement.
metric_assessments.network_demand: Network Demand is solid (8.0 volume/MC %), meeting the expectations you would expect for a protocol at this stage.
metric_assessments.dilution_control: Dilution Control is a concern (23.84 circulating %). This dimension is below par and worth monitoring closely.
metric_assessments.protocol_maturity: Protocol Maturity is a clear strength (11 MC rank), placing this token well above most peers on this dimension.

quality_narrative.classification_reason: Hyperliquid is rated Speculative because while it has genuine strengths in protocol maturity, it also has a notable weakness in dilution control that introduces meaningful uncertainty. The token supply dynamics add further risk. Speculative means real potential but less predictable outcomes than a Safe-rated asset.
quality_narrative.investment_narrative: Hyperliquid is a Cash-Flow Protocol with mixed fundamentals, scoring 5.2/10 overall. Its clearest strength is protocol maturity, while dilution control remains the main area to watch. Key risks: future token dilution (FDV/MC ratio: 4.2x); low dilution control score (1/10); only 24% of supply currently circulating. Hyperliquid is appropriate for investors with higher risk tolerance and conviction in its long-term growth thesis.
quality_narrative.quality_conclusion: Hyperliquid scores 5.2/10 (Speculative) as a Cash-Flow Protocol. The overall quality profile reflects the protocol's maturity, fee economics, and token supply dynamics relative to peers.

coin_profile.description: Hedera is an enterprise-grade public distributed ledger using hashgraph consensus technology rather than a traditional blockchain. It offers fast, fair, and secure transactions at low cost, and is governed by a council of major corporations including Google, IBM, and Deutsche Telekom.

coin_profile.name: Helium
coin_profile.bucket_explanation: A Cash-Flow Protocol is a blockchain or app that earns real money from its users — just like a business. Every time someone makes a trade, borrows money, or uses the network, it collects a small fee. The more people use it, the more fees it earns. We value these tokens similarly to how you would value a business — by looking at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it.
coin_profile.description: Helium (HNT) — a Cash-Flow Protocol ranked #225 by market cap.

dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

meta.data_note: No protocol fee or TVL data found for this token on DeFiLlama. Charts 1 and 2 are unavailable. Charts 3 and 4 show current-year supply and dilution data from CoinGecko.

network_economics.network_synthesis: Helium (HNT) is a Cash-Flow Protocol classified as Dangerous. Network economics data is available for further analysis.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 4.0/10 and survivability 36.7%. Base: 3.0% p.a., Bull: 9.0% p.a., Bear: -37.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.method_explanation: How we valued this token: We treat this like a small business. It earns fees every time someone uses it, so we look at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it. We combine up to three simple checks: (1) How busy is the network? More activity usually means more value. (2) Is the market cap cheap or expensive compared to the fees it earns? (3) What price would make sense given its size rank? The Speculative Fair Value is the average of whichever checks produced a sensible result.
forecast_meta.growth_explanation: Base (3.0%/yr): projected growth based on this token's quality score (4.0/10). Bull (9.0%/yr): adoption accelerates and network usage grows strongly. Bear (-37.0%/yr): adoption slows or competition erodes the token's position. The bear scenario is steeper than usual because survivability is only 36.7% — this token has weaker dilution control or holder value accrual, making it more vulnerable in a downturn.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: this token has no DeFiLlama fee tracking. Valuation relies entirely on network activity and market positioning signals. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment did not fire: FDV/MC is within the acceptable range for this quality tier, so no dilution penalty was applied. Only 2 methods contributed to the median. More data sources (DeFiLlama fee history) would improve confidence in this estimate. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.
